name: Animated Shiny Text
description: A light glare effect which pans across text making it appear as if it is shimmering.

visual_summary: Animated Shiny Text is a UI component that displays animated text with a shimmering effect. It is used for highlighting important information or creating visually appealing UI elements. A developer would use this component when they need to add a dynamic and attention-grabbing text element to their application.
